notes: B0010.r37 known Wi-Fi recovery. Stores up to 10 saved networks, retries the last profile, scans and reconnects to the strongest usable known SSID, validates IP/DNS/clock/HTTPS, prompts for Wi-Fi Settings when none is available, and rescans after 15/30/60 seconds. Retains static no-flicker OTA, full-file SHA-256, six-second P4/C6 stabilization, C6 ESP-Hosted 2.12.9, NO DATA gating and sensor-expiry reminders.
